name: AWS Production Overrun — Q1 2026
description: Engineering team over-provisioned cloud resources for a campaign launch, leading to ₹8.7L unplanned spend in 6 weeks.

events.action: Provisioned 12× m5.2xlarge instances for campaign traffic spike
events.note: No approval gate for cloud provisioning above ₹50,000

events.action: Added 4× additional r5.xlarge instances after initial load test showed memory pressure
events.note: Incremental provisioning — no budget gate triggered because each request was under ₹75k

events.action: Reviewed monthly cloud bill — noted 340% spike vs December baseline
events.note: Flagged to manager but no action taken — assumed campaign-related

events.action: Campaign ended — forgot to scale down instances
events.note: Instances ran at near-zero utilization for 18 days

events.action: Discovered idle instances during routine audit — terminated all 16 instances
events.note: Corrective action taken — but ₹4.15L already spent needlessly

name: SaaS Duplicate Subscriptions — Procurement vs Shadow IT
description: Two separate teams purchased overlapping project management tools without visibility into existing enterprise licenses, resulting in ₹11.2L duplicate spend.

events.action: Renewed enterprise Jira license — 150 seats at ₹4,800/seat/year
Purchased Linear subscription for product team — 45 seats, ₹3,200/seat/year
events.note: No IT approval gate — P-Card purchase under ₹2L limit — not visible to procurement

events.action: Onboarded design team to Monday.com — 30 seats, ₹4,100/seat/year
context_missing: Linear already purchased for product team
events.note: CFO approved without checking IT software register — register not maintained in real time

events.action: Annual software audit — discovered 3 overlapping project management tools
events.note: Audit triggered after IT budget review. Linear at 12% utilization, Monday at 8% utilization

events.action: Cancelled Linear and Monday.com after 90-day minimum commitment period
events.note: Had to pay 90-day minimum — ₹1.33L wasted even after cancellation decision
